description: You are a data governance analyst securing a regional sales report using the file sales_data.csv located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv. Configure Row-Level Security (RLS) by creating four roles with specific DAX filters on the sales_data table: North_Manager ([Region] = "North"), South_Manager ([Region] = "South"), East_Manager ([Region] = "East"), and West_Manager ([Region] = "West"). Include a DAX measure named Total_Sales = SUM(sales_data[Sales_Amount]). The report must feature a page named 'Sales Summary' containing a Clustered Column Chart showing Sales_Amount by Region and a Table visual showing Region, Sales_Rep, and Sales_Amount. Save the final report as Regional_RLS_Report.pbix to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\. Login: Docker, no password required.
